items.title: Content Calendar
items.description: Social media and content planning with Court Reserve event integration.

items.title: Court Reserve Sync Expansion
items.description: Events, leagues, and registrations pulled from Court Reserve for scheduling and content planning.

items.title: Front Desk Schedule Overlay
items.description: Today's schedule visible as an overlay on the front desk widget.

items.title: Commission & Payout Reports
items.description: Staff activity tracking with configurable commission calculations.

items.title: Multi-Club Onboarding
items.description: Self-service club signup, branding, and subdomain provisioning.

items.title: Smarter Magic Schedule
items.description: Role-specific scheduling, high-traffic day awareness, and respect for existing manual drafts.

items.title: Schedule Release Notifications
items.description: Email and in-app notifications when a schedule is released to staff.

items.title: Checklist Improvements
items.description: More prominent notes, checklist history view, and completion digest emails.

items.title: Schedule Workflow Rework
items.description: Simplified draft-to-release flow. Edit shifts in-place, partial window releases, and staff notifications on publish.

items.title: Availability UX Improvements
items.description: More prominent date picker, clearer due date display, out-of-window warnings, and availability notes.

items.title: Schedule View Enhancements
items.description: Closed-hours display, admin/non-admin view separation, hours breakdown with role detail, and target hours ranges.

items.title: 15-Minute Scheduling
items.description: Schedule grid supports 15-minute increments for finer shift control.

items.title: My-Shift Highlighting
items.description: Your own shifts are visually highlighted on the full team schedule.

items.title: Staff Scheduling
items.description: Build schedules with drag-to-assign, coverage-aware magic schedule, and draft/release workflow.

items.title: Availability Management
items.description: Monthly availability windows with staff submissions, admin review, and deadline reminders.

items.title: Shift Swap & Take
items.description: Staff can post shifts for swap or take. Coworkers claim, admin approves.

items.title: Schedule PDF Export
items.description: Export week or month schedules as PDF. Supports 'My schedule' and full team views.

items.title: Daily Checklists
items.description: Configurable opening/midday/closing checklists with completion tracking.

items.title: Pipeline & Lead Management
items.description: 4-pipeline kanban with activity timeline, cadence tracking, and source reporting.

items.title: SOPs with AI Suggest
items.description: Standard operating procedures library with markdown editor, iframe embeds, and AI-powered category/tag suggestions.
